allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next-auth:', pkg.dependencies['next-auth']\); console.log\('zod:', pkg.dependencies['zod']\); console.log\('@prisma/client:', pkg.dependencies['@prisma/client']\); console.log\('prisma:', pkg.devDependencies['prisma']\);")
